center.name: 萬卡韋利卡大區
center.summary: 萬卡韋利卡大區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括须蜂鸟、Striated earthcreeper、白腹抖尾地雀等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the basin of the Mantaro River in Peru's departments of Huancavelica and Ayacucho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: latistriata occurs in the south-central departments of Huancavelica, Ayacucho, and Arequipa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-fronted canastero is found in the Andes of south-central Peru's Huancavelica, Ayacucho, Apurímac, and Cuzco departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: albigularis occurs in the Department of Huancavelica in southwestern Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Peru from La Libertad and Ancash departments south to the departments of Huancavelica and Ayacucho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: huancavelicae is found only in the southern Peruvian Andes of the Department of Huancavelica. The striated earthcreeper inhabits areas of denser woody vegetation than most other earthcreepers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Peru where it inhabits high level, marshy grassland in the Junín Region and possibly also in the Huancavelica Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: albolimbata is found in Peru's departments of Huancavelica, Ayacucho, and Apurímac, in the drainages of the Mantaro, Pampas, and Chalhuanca rivers. The species inhabits dry Andean valleys characterized by rocky and scrubby hillsides and open woodland
